drift_observations.note: adoption-context.ts (new module) not listed; interview phase and approval gates not described in editing rules
Current State lacked: adoption-context.ts, interview phase, requireApprovalGates(), routing-aware plan generation
Design spec for implemented behavior was still in raw; promoted to specs/active

polaris_md_updates.change_summary: Added adoption-context.ts to file inventory. Added editing rule describing interview phase order, operator-context separation, and requireApprovalGates() requirement before mutation phases.

summary_md_updates.change_summary: Appended to Current State: adoption-context.ts two-model design, interview phase, requireApprovalGates() with four category gates and non-interactive guard.

docs_ingested.reason: Design spec for operator interview architecture now fully implemented by POL-402, POL-403, POL-404, POL-405

docs_archived.reason: UX synthesis; not directly implemented in this cluster; keep raw for operator review
Implemented in POL-396 (separate cluster); not in scope for POL-395 librarian
Not implemented in this cluster; keep raw

yaml_updates.change_summary: Set status: active, kind: spec, promoted_by: closeout-librarian at time of promotion.

evidence_summary: Cluster POL-395 implemented four children (POL-402 through POL-405) adding the operator-answer model (adoption-context.ts), interview phase (adopt-command.ts), routing-aware plan generation (adoption-plan.ts), and approval gates (adopt-approve.ts, adopt-instructions.ts, adopt-smartdocs.ts). POLARIS.md for src/cli was updated to list adoption-context.ts and describe the interview/gate pattern in editing rules. SUMMARY.md was updated to reflect the two-model adoption design, interview phase, and requireApprovalGates() framework. The design spec pol-391-existing-repo-operator-interview-design.md was promoted from smartdocs/raw to smartdocs/specs/active since all four ordered children are now implemented. No cognition notes were pending. No broken links were found. src/POLARIS.md and src/SUMMARY.md required no changes. pol-392 was not promoted (it belongs to POL-396). All committed files are within allowed_write_paths.
